steps.title: Refer back to the wall
steps.content: The previous sentence places the sculpture on a university building wall. The next sentence describes how the sculpture appears at that location, so the transition must point back spatially.

steps.title: Reject time, example, contrast
steps.content: Choice B signals time, Choice C introduces an example, and Choice D creates contrast. The location word points back to the wall and fits the physical description that follows. The answer is A.
